workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Give me the manager view on this Iron Creek Mining exec meeting notes. This is time-sensitive -- customer is waiting.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-28 17:02 EST
Subject: Re: Re: escalation triage Timeline

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-05 15:28 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Iron Creek Mining

Just checking in on the escalation triage proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-27 17:26 EST
Subject: Re: escalation triage Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with escalation triage. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-J trap (Ignores the most-recent message in favor of earlier in thread); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-J failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-J failure mode (Ignores the most-recent message in favor of earlier in thread)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-J -- Ignores the most-recent message in favor of earlier in thread
